23// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
24// Construction
25// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
26GreenFHom3DPer2D::GreenFHom3DPer2D(dcmplx wvl, dcmplx eps, rvec kin, rvec lat1,
27 rvec lat2)
28 : GreenFHom3DPer(wvl, eps, kin), a1(lat1), a2(lat2) {
29 Init();
30}
31
32GreenFHom3DPer2D::GreenFHom3DPer2D(dcmplx wvl, dcmplx eps, dcmplx mu, rvec kin,
33 rvec lat1, rvec lat2)
34 : GreenFHom3DPer(wvl, eps, mu, kin), a1(lat1), a2(lat2) {
35 Init();
36}

38// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
39// Initialization
40// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
41// Common initialization: lattice metrics, reciprocal lattice, k‑projection, Ewald parameter.
42void GreenFHom3DPer2D::Init() {
43 thereIsNoLookupTable = 1;
44
45 a1a1 = dot(a1, a1);
46 a2a2 = dot(a2, a2);
47 norma1 = sqrt(a1a1);
48 norma2 = sqrt(a2a2);
49 a1a2 = dot(a1, a2);
50 crossFactor = (a1a1 * a2a2) - a1a2 * a1a2;
51 perp = cross(a1, a2);
52 perp /= sqrt(dot(perp, perp));
53
54 Reciprocal();
55 ToPlane();
56
57 e = PI / sqrt(V);
58 EvaluationTerms(Etm);
59}
60
61// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
62// Lattice helpers
63// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
64// Project Bloch vector onto the lattice plane (discard normal component).
65void GreenFHom3DPer2D::ToPlane() {
66 double ka1(dot(k, a1));
67 double ka2(dot(k, a2));
68 double k1((ka1 * a2a2 - ka2 * a1a2) / crossFactor);
69 double k2((ka2 * a1a1 - ka1 * a1a2) / crossFactor);
70 k = k1 * a1 + k2 * a2;
71}
72
73// Build reciprocal lattice vectors (b1, b2) and unit‑cell volume V.
74void GreenFHom3DPer2D::Reciprocal() {
75 rvec c(cross(a1, a2));
76 double norm2(dot(c, c));
77 b1 = (2 * PI / norm2) * cross(a2, c);
78 b2 = (-2 * PI / norm2) * cross(a1, c);
79 V = sqrt(norm2);
80}
81
82// Map a displacement to the primitive cell; returns the translation used.
83rvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::PrimitiveCell(rvec& target) {
84 double ta1(dot(target, a1));
85 double ta2(dot(target, a2));
86 rvec initial(target);
87 double t1((ta1 * a2a2 - ta2 * a1a2) / crossFactor);
88 double t2((ta2 * a1a1 - ta1 * a1a2) / crossFactor);
89
90 const double thresh= 0.5+1e-4;
91 while ((t1 > thresh || t1 < -thresh)) {
92 if (t1 > thresh) {
93 target -= a1;
94 }
95 if (t1 < -thresh) {
96 target += a1;
97 }
98 ta1 = dot(target, a1);
99 ta2 = dot(target, a2);
100 t1 = (ta1 * a2a2 - ta2 * a1a2) / crossFactor;
101 }
102 while ((t2 > thresh || t2 < -thresh)) {
103 if (t2 > thresh) {
104 target -= a2;
105 }
106 if (t2 < -thresh) {
107 target += a2;
108 }
109 ta1 = dot(target, a1);
110 ta2 = dot(target, a2);
111 t2 = (ta2 * a1a1 - ta1 * a1a2) / crossFactor;
112 }
113 return initial - target;
114}
115
116// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
117// Thresholds & translations
118// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
119//Far/near heuristic for translated triangle pairs (centroid distance vs. size).
120bool GreenFHom3DPer2D::AboveThresholdTranslate(Triangle* T, Triangle* Tp,
121 rvec t) {
122 rvec dr(T->Center() - Tp->Center() - t);
123 double d = sqrt(dot(dr, dr));
124 double psum = T->Perimeter() + Tp->Perimeter();
125 return d > psum / 2.;
126}
127
128// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
129// Ewald split — spatial (real‑space images)
130// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
131// Spatial part of Ewald sum for scalar kernel.
132dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::EwaldSpatial(rvec r) {
133 dcmplx out(0.);
134 double ka1(dot(k, a1));
135 double ka2(dot(k, a2));
136 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
137 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
138 rvec dif(r - i * a1 - j * a2);
139 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
140 dcmplx sum(exp(-I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e)) +
141 exp(I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e)));
142 out += exp(i * ka1 * I + j * ka2 * I) * sum / dis;
143 }
144 }
145 out /= 8 * PI;
146 return out;
147}
148
149// Spatial part of Ewald sum for source‑gradient grad'G.
150cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientEwaldSpatial(rvec r) {
151 cvec out(0., 0., 0.);
152 double ka1(dot(k, a1));
153 double ka2(dot(k, a2));
154 double spi(sqrt(PI));
155 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
156 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
157 rvec dif(r - i * a1 - j * a2);
158 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
159 dcmplx sum(exp(-I * k_B * dis) * (-1. - I * k_B * dis) *
160 EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e)) +
161 exp(I * k_B * dis) * (-1. + I * k_B * dis) *
162 EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e)) -
163 dis * 4 * e *
164 exp(-dis * dis * e * e + k_B * k_B / (4 * e * e)) / spi);
165 out += exp(i * ka1 * I + j * ka2 * I) * sum * dif / (dis * dis * dis);
166 }
167 }
168 out /= -8 * PI;
169 return out;
170}
171
172// Spatial part returning {G, grad'G} at once.
173std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> GreenFHom3DPer2D::EwaldAndGradientSpatial(rvec r) {
174 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> out(0., cvec(0., 0., 0.));
175 double ka1(dot(k, a1));
176 double ka2(dot(k, a2));
177 double spi(sqrt(PI));
178 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
179 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
180 rvec dif(r - i * a1 - j * a2);
181 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
182 dcmplx term1 = exp(-I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e));
183 dcmplx term2 = exp(I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e));
184 dcmplx prefactor = exp(i * ka1 * I + j * ka2 * I);
185 out.first += prefactor * (term1 + term2) / dis;
186 dcmplx sum((-1. - I * k_B * dis) * term1 + (-1. + I * k_B * dis) * term2 -
187 dis * 4 * e *
188 exp(-dis * dis * e * e + k_B * k_B / (4 * e * e)) / spi);
189 out.second += prefactor * sum * dif / (dis * dis * dis);
190 }
191 }
192 out.first /= 8 * PI;
193 out.second /= -8 * PI;
194 return out;
195}
196
197// Smoothed spatial part of Ewald sum for scalar kernel (near singularity).
198dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::EwaldSpatialSmoothed(rvec r) {
199 dcmplx id(1., 0.);
200 dcmplx out(0.);
201 double ka1(dot(k, a1));
202 double ka2(dot(k, a2));
203 double eps(1.e-10);
204 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
205 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
206 rvec dif(r - i * a1 - j * a2);
207 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
208 if (!((i == 0) && (j == 0))) { // Regular formula
209 dcmplx sum(exp(-I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e)) +
210 exp(I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e)));
211 out += exp(i * ka1 * I + j * ka2 * I) * sum / dis;
212 } else { // On the singularity
213 if (dis > eps) { // Removes singular term numerically
214 dcmplx sum(exp(-I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e)) +
215 exp(I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e)));
216 out += (sum - 2. * id) / dis + k_B * k_B * dis;
217 } else { // Takes limit if exactly zero
218 out += 2. * I * k_B * (EvErfc(I * k_B / (2 * e)) - id) -
219 4. * e / sqrt(PI) * exp(k_B * k_B / (4. * e * e));
220 }
221 }
222 }
223 }
224 out /= 8 * PI;
225 return out;
226}
227
228// Smoothed spatial part of Ewald sum for source‑gradient.
229cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientEwaldSpatialSmoothed(rvec r) {
230 dcmplx id(1., 0.);
231 cvec out(0., 0., 0.);
232 double ka1(dot(k, a1));
233 double ka2(dot(k, a2));
234 double spi(sqrt(PI));
235 double eps(1.e-10);
236 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
237 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
238 rvec dif(r - i * a1 - j * a2);
239 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
240 if (!((i == 0) && (j == 0))) { // Regular formula
241 dcmplx sum(exp(-I * k_B * dis) * (-1. - I * k_B * dis) *
242 EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e)) +
243 exp(I * k_B * dis) * (-1. + I * k_B * dis) *
244 EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e)) -
245 dis * 4 * e *
246 exp(-dis * dis * e * e + k_B * k_B / (4 * e * e)) / spi);
247 out += exp(i * ka1 * I + j * ka2 * I) * sum * dif / (dis * dis * dis);
248 } else { // On the singularity
249 if (dis > eps) { // Removes singular term numerically
250 dcmplx sum(exp(-I * k_B * dis) * (-1. - I * k_B * dis) *
251 EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e)) +
252 exp(I * k_B * dis) * (-1. + I * k_B * dis) *
253 EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e)) -
254 dis * 4 * e *
255 exp(-dis * dis * e * e + k_B * k_B / (4 * e * e)) /
256 spi);
257 out +=
258 (sum + 2. * id) * dif / (dis * dis * dis) + k_B * k_B * dif / dis;
259 } else { // Takes limit if exactly zero
260 cvec radial(1., 1., 1.);
261 out += k_B * k_B * radial / sqrt(3.);
262 }
263 }
264 }
265 }
266 out /= -8 * PI;
267 return out;
268}
269
270// Spatial part returning {G, grad'G} with smoothing.
271std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> GreenFHom3DPer2D::EwaldAndGradientSpatialSmoothed(
272 rvec r) {
273 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> out(0., cvec(0., 0., 0.));
274 dcmplx id(1., 0.);
275 double ka1(dot(k, a1));
276 double ka2(dot(k, a2));
277 double spi(sqrt(PI));
278 double eps(1.e-10);
279 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
280 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
281 rvec dif(r - i * a1 - j * a2);
282 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
283 if (i != 0 || j != 0) { // Regular formula
284 dcmplx term1 =
285 exp(-I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e));
286 dcmplx term2 = exp(I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e));
287 dcmplx prefactor = exp(i * ka1 * I + j * ka2 * I);
288 out.first += prefactor * (term1 + term2) / dis;
289 dcmplx sum((-1. - I * k_B * dis) * term1 +
290 (-1. + I * k_B * dis) * term2 -
291 dis * 4 * e *
292 exp(-dis * dis * e * e + k_B * k_B / (4 * e * e)) / spi);
293 out.second += prefactor * sum * dif / (dis * dis * dis);
294 } else if (dis > eps) { // Removes singular term numerically
295 dcmplx term1 =
296 exp(-I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e - I * k_B / (2 * e));
297 dcmplx term2 = exp(I * k_B * dis) * EvErfc(dis * e + I * k_B / (2 * e));
298 out.first += (term1 + term2 - 2. * id) / dis + k_B * k_B * dis;
299 dcmplx sum((-1. - I * k_B * dis) * term1 +
300 (-1. + I * k_B * dis) * term2 -
301 dis * 4 * e *
302 exp(-dis * dis * e * e + k_B * k_B / (4 * e * e)) / spi);
303 out.second +=
304 (sum + 2. * id) * dif / (dis * dis * dis) + k_B * k_B * dif / dis;
305 } else { // Takes limit if exactly zero
306 out.first += 2. * I * k_B * (EvErfc(I * k_B / (2 * e)) - id) -
307 4. * e / sqrt(PI) * exp(k_B * k_B / (4. * e * e));
308 cvec radial(1., 1., 1.);
309 out.second += k_B * k_B * radial / sqrt(3.);
310 }
311 }
312 }
313 out.first /= 8 * PI;
314 out.second /= -8 * PI;
315 return out;
316}
317
318// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
319// Ewald split — spectral (reciprocal‑lattice sum)
320// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
321// Spectral (reciprocal‑lattice) part of Ewald sum for scalar kernel.
322dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::EwaldSpectral(rvec r) {
323 dcmplx out(0.);
324 rvec rtan(dot(r, a1) / dot(a1, a1) * a1 + dot(r, a2) / dot(a2, a2) * a2);
325 rvec rperp(r - rtan);
326 double perdif(dot(rperp, perp));
327 if (perdif * perdif * e * e < 900.) {
328 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
329 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
330 rvec kij(k - i * b1 - j * b2);
331 dcmplx gamma(csqrt(dot(kij, kij) - k_B * k_B));
332 if (imag(gamma) > 0) gamma = -gamma;
333 dcmplx gamma2e(gamma / (2 * e));
334 dcmplx sum(exp(gamma * perdif) * EvErfc(gamma2e + perdif * e) +
335 exp(-gamma * perdif) * EvErfc(gamma2e - perdif * e));
336 out += exp(I * dot(kij, r)) * sum / gamma;
337 }
338 }
339 } else {
340 if (perdif < 0) perdif = -perdif;
341 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
342 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
343 rvec kij(k - i * b1 - j * b2);
344 dcmplx gamma(csqrt(dot(kij, kij) - k_B * k_B));
345 if (imag(gamma) > 0) gamma = -gamma;
346 dcmplx gamma2e(gamma / (2 * e));
347 dcmplx sum(exp(-perdif * e * perdif * e) / (sqrt(PI) * perdif * e) +
348 exp(-gamma * perdif) * EvErfc(gamma2e - perdif * e));
349 out += exp(I * dot(kij, r)) * sum / gamma;
350 }
351 }
352 }
353 out /= 4 * V;
354 return out;
355}
356
357// Spectral part of Ewald sum for source‑gradient.
358cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientEwaldSpectral(rvec r) {
359 cvec out(0.);
360 rvec rtan(dot(r, a1) / dot(a1, a1) * a1 + dot(r, a2) / dot(a2, a2) * a2);
361 rvec rperp(r - rtan);
362 double perdif(dot(rperp, perp));
363 if (perdif * perdif * e * e < 900.) {
364 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
365 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
366 rvec kij(k - i * b1 - j * b2);
367 dcmplx gamma(csqrt(dot(kij, kij) - k_B * k_B));
368 if (imag(gamma) > 0) gamma = -gamma;
369 dcmplx gamma2e(gamma / (2 * e));
370 dcmplx sumplus(gamma2e + perdif * e);
371 dcmplx summinus(gamma2e - perdif * e);
372 dcmplx EvErfcsumplus(EvErfc(sumplus));
373 dcmplx EvErfcsumminus(EvErfc(summinus));
374 dcmplx expgammaplus(exp(gamma * perdif));
375 dcmplx expgammaminus(exp(-gamma * perdif));
376 dcmplx phase(exp(I * dot(kij, r)));
377 dcmplx sum(expgammaplus * EvErfcsumplus +
378 expgammaminus * EvErfcsumminus);
379 out += phase * sum * I * kij / gamma;
380 dcmplx secondsum(expgammaplus * EvErfcsumplus -
381 expgammaminus * EvErfcsumminus);
382 out += perp * phase * secondsum;
383 }
384 }
385 } else {
386 double sign(1.);
387 if (perdif < 0) {
388 perdif = -perdif;
389 sign = -1.;
390 }
391 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
392 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
393 rvec kij(k - i * b1 - j * b2);
394 dcmplx gamma(csqrt(dot(kij, kij) - k_B * k_B));
395 if (imag(gamma) > 0) gamma = -gamma;
396 dcmplx gamma2e(gamma / (2 * e));
397 dcmplx summinus(gamma2e - perdif * e);
398 dcmplx EvErfcsumminus(EvErfc(summinus));
399 dcmplx expgammaminus(exp(-gamma * perdif));
400 dcmplx phase(exp(I * dot(kij, r)));
401 dcmplx sum(exp(-perdif * e * perdif * e) / (sqrt(PI) * perdif * e) +
402 expgammaminus * EvErfcsumminus);
403 out += phase * sum * I * kij / gamma;
404 dcmplx secondsum(exp(-perdif * e * perdif * e) /
405 (sqrt(PI) * perdif * e) -
406 expgammaminus * EvErfcsumminus);
407 out += sign * perp * phase * secondsum;
408 }
409 }
410 }
411 out /= -4 * V;
412 return out;
413}
414
415// Spectral part returning {G, grad'G} at once.
416std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> GreenFHom3DPer2D::EwaldAndGradientSpectral(rvec r) {
417 using std::pair;
418 pair<dcmplx, cvec> out(0., cvec(0, 0, 0));
419 rvec rtan(dot(r, a1) / dot(a1, a1) * a1 + dot(r, a2) / dot(a2, a2) * a2);
420 rvec rperp(r - rtan);
421 double perdif(dot(rperp, perp));
422 if (perdif * perdif * e * e < 900.) {
423 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
424 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
425 rvec kij(k - i * b1 - j * b2);
426 dcmplx gamma(csqrt(dot(kij, kij) - k_B * k_B));
427 if (imag(gamma) > 0) gamma = -gamma;
428 dcmplx gamma2e(gamma / (2 * e));
429 dcmplx sumplus(gamma2e + perdif * e);
430 dcmplx summinus(gamma2e - perdif * e);
431 dcmplx EvErfcsumplus(EvErfc(sumplus));
432 dcmplx EvErfcsumminus(EvErfc(summinus));
433 dcmplx expgammaplus(exp(gamma * perdif));
434 dcmplx expgammaminus(exp(-gamma * perdif));
435 dcmplx phase(exp(I * dot(kij, r)));
436 dcmplx sum(expgammaplus * EvErfcsumplus +
437 expgammaminus * EvErfcsumminus);
438 out.first += phase * sum / gamma;
439 out.second += phase * sum * I * kij / gamma;
440 dcmplx secondsum(expgammaplus * EvErfcsumplus -
441 expgammaminus * EvErfcsumminus);
442 out.second += perp * phase * secondsum;
443 }
444 }
445 } else {
446 double sign(1.);
447 if (perdif < 0) {
448 perdif = -perdif;
449 sign = -1.;
450 }
451 for (int i(-evaluationTerms); i <= evaluationTerms; ++i) {
452 for (int j(-evaluationTerms); j <= evaluationTerms; ++j) {
453 rvec kij(k - i * b1 - j * b2);
454 dcmplx gamma(csqrt(dot(kij, kij) - k_B * k_B));
455 if (imag(gamma) > 0) gamma = -gamma;
456 dcmplx gamma2e(gamma / (2 * e));
457 dcmplx summinus(gamma2e - perdif * e);
458 dcmplx EvErfcsumminus(EvErfc(summinus));
459 dcmplx expgammaminus(exp(-gamma * perdif));
460 dcmplx phase(exp(I * dot(kij, r)));
461 dcmplx sum(exp(-perdif * e * perdif * e) / (sqrt(PI) * perdif * e) +
462 expgammaminus * EvErfcsumminus);
463 out.first += phase * sum / gamma;
464 out.second += phase * sum * I * kij / gamma;
465 dcmplx secondsum(exp(-perdif * e * perdif * e) /
466 (sqrt(PI) * perdif * e) -
467 expgammaminus * EvErfcsumminus);
468 out.second += sign * perp * phase * secondsum;
469 }
470 }
471 }
472 out.first /= 4 * V;
473 out.second /= -4 * V;
474 return out;
475}
476
477// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
478// Ewald acceleration & pointwise evaluations (Bloch‑periodic)
479// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
484dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::Evaluate(rvec r, rvec rp) { return Ewald(r - rp); }
485
486// Scalar kernel at a fixed lattice translation t.
487dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t) {
488 return (EwaldSpatial(r - rp - t) + EwaldSpectral(r - rp - t)) *
489 exp(I * dot(k, t));
490}
491
492// Ewald sum for the scalar kernel.
493dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::Ewald(rvec r) {
494 rvec t(PrimitiveCell(r));
495 return (EwaldSpatial(r) + EwaldSpectral(r)) * exp(I * dot(k, t));
496}
497
498// Smoothed scalar kernel (near singularity) with primitive‑cell mapping.
499dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::Smoothed(rvec r, rvec rp) {
500 return EwaldSmoothed(r - rp);
501}
502
503// Smoothed scalar kernel at fixed translation t.
504dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::SmoothedTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t) {
505 return (EwaldSpatialSmoothed(r - rp - t) + EwaldSpectral(r - rp - t)) *
506 exp(I * dot(k, t));
507}
508
509// Ewald sum for the smoothed scalar kernel.
510dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::EwaldSmoothed(rvec r) {
511 rvec t(PrimitiveCell(r));
512 return (EwaldSpatialSmoothed(r) + EwaldSpectral(r)) * exp(I * dot(k, t));
513}
514
515// Source‑gradient grad'G for periodic kernel with primitive‑cell mapping.
516cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::Gradient(rvec r, rvec rp) {
517 return GradientEwald(r - rp);
518}
519
520// Source‑gradient grad'G at fixed translation t.
521cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t) {
522 return (GradientEwaldSpatial(r - rp - t) +
523 GradientEwaldSpectral(r - rp - t)) *
524 exp(I * dot(k, t));
525}
526
527// Ewald sum for the gradient w.r.t. source (grad'G).
528cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientEwald(rvec r) {
529 rvec t(PrimitiveCell(r));
530 return (GradientEwaldSpatial(r) + GradientEwaldSpectral(r)) *
531 exp(I * dot(k, t));
532}
533
534// Smoothed source‑gradient with primitive‑cell mapping.
535cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientSmoothed(rvec r, rvec rp) {
536 return GradientEwaldSmoothed(r - rp);
537}
538
539// Smoothed source‑gradient at fixed translation t.
540cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientSmoothedTranslate(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t) {
541 return (GradientEwaldSpatialSmoothed(r - rp - t) +
542 GradientEwaldSpectral(r - rp - t)) *
543 exp(I * dot(k, t));
544}
545
546// Ewald sum for the smoothed gradient w.r.t. source (grad'G).
547cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientEwaldSmoothed(rvec r) {
548 rvec t(PrimitiveCell(r));
549 return (GradientEwaldSpatialSmoothed(r) + GradientEwaldSpectral(r)) *
550 exp(I * dot(k, t));
551}
552
553// Evaluate {G, grad'G} together at a fixed lattice translation t.
554std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateandGradientTranslate(rvec r,
555 rvec rp,
556 rvec t) {
557 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> out1, out2, out;
558 out1 = EwaldAndGradientSpatial(r - rp - t);
559 out2 = EwaldAndGradientSpectral(r - rp - t);
560 out.first = (out1.first + out2.first) * exp(I * dot(k, t));
561 out.second = (out1.second + out2.second) * exp(I * dot(k, t));
562 return out;
563}
564
565// Evaluate smoothed {G, grad'G} together at fixed translation t.
566std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateandGradientSmoothedTranslate(
567 rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t) {
568 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> out1, out2, out;
569 out1 = EwaldAndGradientSpatialSmoothed(r - rp - t);
570 out2 = EwaldAndGradientSpectral(r - rp - t);
571 out.first = (out1.first + out2.first) * exp(I * dot(k, t));
572 out.second = (out1.second + out2.second) * exp(I * dot(k, t));
573 return out;
574}
575
576// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
577// RWG‑weighted integrals
578// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
579// Triangle–triangle D entry (disabled for periodic homogeneous case).
580dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::IntegrateD(RWGFun* /*f*/, RWGFun* /*fp*/) { exit(1); }
581
582// Triangle–triangle K entry (disabled for periodic homogeneous case).
583dcmplx GreenFHom3DPer2D::IntegrateK(RWGFun* /*f*/, RWGFun* /*fp*/) { exit(1); }
584
589cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::IntegrateDelta(rvec r, RWGFun* fp) {
590 cvec out(0., 0., 0.);
591 Triangle* Tp = fp->TrianglePtr();
592 rvec rp[3];
593 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
594 rp[i] = Tp->Node(i);
595 }
596 double Ap = Tp->Area(), perimp = Tp->Perimeter();
597 rvec Tc(Tp->Center());
598 rvec junk(r - Tc);
599 rvec t(PrimitiveCell(junk));
600 double dist = sqrt(dot(r - t - Tc, r - t - Tc));
601 double kr = sqrt(norm(k_B)) * dist;
602
603 int Ndunavant;
604 double(*xdunavant)[3], *wdunavant;
605 if (NeedsAccurate) {
606 Ndunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N5;
607 xdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x5;
608 wdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::w17 : dunavant::w5;
609 } else {
610 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
611 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
612 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
613 }
614
615 bool NeedsSingSub = (dist < perimp) || (kr < 0.2 * PI);
616 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> (GreenFHom3DPer2D::*DKfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp,
617 rvec t) =
618 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateandGradientSmoothedTranslate
619 : &GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateandGradientTranslate;
620
621 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> DKtemp;
622 dcmplx Dtemp;
623 cvec Ktemp;
624 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
625 rvec sp = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
626 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
627 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[i];
628 DKtemp = (this->*DKfunction)(r, sp, t);
629 Dtemp = dAp * DKtemp.first;
630 Ktemp = dAp * DKtemp.second;
631 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(sp));
632 out += (fpsp * Dtemp - 1. / (k_B * k_B) * fp->RWGPreFactor() * Ktemp);
633 }
634
635 if (NeedsSingSub) {
636 SingSub ss;
637 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fp, r - t);
638 out += exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) / (4. * PI) *
639 (-1. / (k_B * k_B) * fp->RWGPreFactor() *
640 (ss.K3(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K3(1)) +
641 (ss.K2(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K2(1)));
642 }
643
644 return out;
645}
646
647// Point–triangle Κ vector integral at observation r (2D‑periodic kernel).
648cvec GreenFHom3DPer2D::IntegrateKappa(rvec r, RWGFun* fp) {
649 cvec out(0., 0., 0.);
650 Triangle* Tp = fp->TrianglePtr();
651 rvec rp[3];
652 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
653 rp[i] = Tp->Node(i);
654 }
655 double Ap = Tp->Area(), perimp = Tp->Perimeter();
656 rvec Tc(Tp->Center());
657 rvec junk(r - Tc);
658 rvec t(PrimitiveCell(junk));
659 double dist = sqrt(dot(r - t - Tc, r - t - Tc));
660 double kr = sqrt(norm(k_B)) * dist;
661
662 int Ndunavant;
663 double(*xdunavant)[3], *wdunavant;
664 if (NeedsAccurate) {
665 Ndunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N5;
666 xdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x5;
667 wdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::w17 : dunavant::w5;
668 } else {
669 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
670 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
671 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
672 }
673
674 bool NeedsSingSub = (dist < perimp) || (kr < 0.2 * PI);
675 cvec (GreenFHom3DPer2D::*Kfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp, rvec t) =
676 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientSmoothedTranslate
677 : &GreenFHom3DPer2D::GradientTranslate;
678
679 cvec Ktemp;
680 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
681 rvec sp = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
682 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
683 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[i];
684 Ktemp = dAp * (this->*Kfunction)(r, sp, t);
685 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(sp));
686 out += cross(Ktemp, (cvec)fpsp);
687 }
688
689 if (NeedsSingSub) {
690 SingSub ss;
691 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fp, r - t);
692 out += exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) / (4. * PI) *
693 (ss.K4(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K4(1));
694 }
695
696 return out;
697}
698
699std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> GreenFHom3DPer2D::PairD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) {
700 // Don't care about symmetry, this is more exact!
701 dcmplx elem(IntegrateD(f, fp));
702 if (f == fp) return std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>(elem, elem);
703 dcmplx elem2(IntegrateD(fp, f));
704 return std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>(elem, elem2);
705}
706
707std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> GreenFHom3DPer2D::PairK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) {
708 // Unfortunately, IntegrateK is not symmetric.
709 dcmplx elem(IntegrateK(f, fp));
710 if (f == fp) return std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>(elem, elem);
711 dcmplx elem2(IntegrateK(fp, f));
712 return std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>(elem, elem2);
713}
714
715// Batched D/K block assembly for same‑triangle RWG sets (periodic case).
716void GreenFHom3DPer2D::SameTriDK(
717 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
718 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> > >& DK) {
719 Triangle *tPtr = fvec[0]->TrianglePtr(), *tpPtr = fpvec[0]->TrianglePtr();
720 rvec r[3], rp[3];
721 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
722 r[i] = tPtr->Node(i);
723 rp[i] = tpPtr->Node(i);
724 }
725 double A = tPtr->Area(), Ap = tpPtr->Area();
726 SingSub ss;
727
728 // Primitive cell is being found only once based on the triangle centres
729 // All other functions are modified to pass this directly
730 rvec junk(tPtr->Center() - tpPtr->Center());
731 rvec t(PrimitiveCell(junk));
732 int tristatus = tPtr->FindAdjacency(tpPtr, t);
733
734 int Ndunavant;
735 double(*xdunavant)[3];
736 double* wdunavant;
737 bool NeedsDanalytic(false);
738 bool NeedsDSingSub(false);
739 bool NeedsKSingSub(false);
740 bool NeedsKLineIntegral(false);
741 bool DistantAboveThreshold;
742 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> (GreenFHom3DPer2D::*DKfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp,
743 rvec t);
744 if (NeedsAccurate) {
745 Ndunavant = tristatus > 0 ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N5;
746 xdunavant = tristatus > 0 ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x5;
747 wdunavant = tristatus > 0 ? dunavant::w17 : dunavant::w5;
748 NeedsDanalytic = tristatus == 3;
749 NeedsKLineIntegral = tristatus == 2;
750 DistantAboveThreshold =
751 tristatus == 0 and AboveThresholdTranslate(tPtr, tpPtr, t);
752 } else {
753 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
754 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
755 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
756 DistantAboveThreshold = AboveThreshold(tPtr->Center() - t, tpPtr->Center());
757 }
758 NeedsDSingSub = !DistantAboveThreshold;
759 NeedsKSingSub = tristatus != 3 and !DistantAboveThreshold;
760 DKfunction = DistantAboveThreshold
761 ? &GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateandGradientTranslate
762 : &GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateandGradientSmoothedTranslate;
763
764 std::vector<rvec> svec(Ndunavant), spvec(Ndunavant);
765 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
766 svec[i] = r[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + r[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
767 r[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
768 spvec[i] = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
769 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
770 }
771
772 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> DKtemp;
773 dcmplx Dtemp;
774 cvec Ktemp;
775 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
776 double dA = A * wdunavant[i];
777 for (int j = 0; j < Ndunavant; ++j) {
778 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[j];
779 DKtemp = (this->*DKfunction)(svec[i], spvec[j], t);
780 Dtemp = dA * dAp * DKtemp.first;
781 Ktemp = dA * dAp * DKtemp.second;
782 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
783 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
784 rvec fs(f->Evaluate(svec[i]));
785 double divf(f->RWGPreFactor());
786 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
787 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
788 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(spvec[j]));
789 double divfp(fp->RWGPreFactor());
790
791 DK[k][l].first +=
792 Dtemp * (dot(fs, fpsp) - 1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf * divfp);
793 DK[k][l].second += dot(fs, cross(Ktemp, (cvec)fpsp));
794 }
795 }
796 }
797
798 if (NeedsDSingSub or NeedsKSingSub) {
799 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fpvec[0], svec[i] - t);
800 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
801 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
802 double divfp(fp->RWGPreFactor());
803 ss.ChangeTriangleRWG(fp);
804 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
805 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
806 double divf(f->RWGPreFactor());
807 rvec fs(f->Evaluate(svec[i]));
808
809 if (NeedsDanalytic) {
810 DK[k][l].first +=
811 exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) * dA / (4. * PI) *
812 (-1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf * (-k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K1(1)) +
813 dot(fs, -k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K2(1)));
814 } else if (NeedsDSingSub) {
815 DK[k][l].first += exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) * dA / (4. * PI) *
816 (-1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf *
817 (ss.K1(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K1(1)) +
818 dot(fs, ss.K2(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K2(1)));
819 }
820 if (NeedsKLineIntegral) {
821 DK[k][l].second +=
822 exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) * dA / (4. * PI) *
823 dot(fs, cross((rvec)(f->FreeVertex() - fp->FreeVertex() - t),
824 ss.K3n(-1)) *
825 divfp / (-2.) -
826 k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K4(1));
827 } else if (NeedsKSingSub) {
828 DK[k][l].second += exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) * dA / (4. * PI) *
829 dot(fs, ss.K4(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K4(1));
830 }
831 }
832 }
833 }
834 }
835
836 if (NeedsKLineIntegral) {
837 // Line integral for surface gradient of 1/R
838 // Note that triangle order is reversed
839 rvec n = cross((rvec)(rp[1] - rp[0]), (rvec)(rp[2] - rp[0]));
840 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
841 rvec &p1 = rp[i], &p2 = rp[(i + 1) % 3];
842 double L = sqrt(dot(p2 - p1, p2 - p1));
843
844 // Outward normal on edge;
845 rvec m = cross((rvec)(p2 - p1), n);
846 m = m / sqrt(dot(m, m));
847
848 // Line integral
849 for (int j = 0; j < gausslegendre::N17; j++) {
850 rvec s = p1 * gausslegendre::x17[j][0] + p2 * gausslegendre::x17[j][1];
851 double dL = L * gausslegendre::w17[j];
852
853 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fvec[0], s + t);
854 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
855 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
856 ss.ChangeTriangleRWG(f);
857 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
858 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
859 rvec pqm = cross((rvec)(f->FreeVertex() - fp->FreeVertex() - t), m);
860
861 DK[k][l].second += -exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) * dL / (4. * PI) *
862 fp->RWGPreFactor() / 2. * dot(pqm, ss.K2(-1));
863 }
864 }
865 }
866 }
867 }
868
869 if (NeedsDanalytic) {
870 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
871 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
872 double divf(f->RWGPreFactor());
873 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
874 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
875 double divfp(fp->RWGPreFactor());
876 // Analytical 4D integral for (div f)(div f')/(4 pi r)
877 DK[k][l].first += -exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) * 1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf *
878 divfp / (4 * PI) * tPtr->getI1();
879 // Analytical 4D integral for f dot f'/(4 pi r)
880 // Note that f=fp and f!=fp need to be treated differently
881 DK[k][l].first +=
882 exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) * divf * divfp / (16. * PI) *
883 tpPtr->getI2Translated(f->FreeVertex(), fp->FreeVertex(), t);
884 }
885 }
886 }
887}
888
889// Batched delta/kappa evaluation for RWGs on one triangle (periodic case).
890void GreenFHom3DPer2D::SameTriDeltaKappa(
891 rvec r, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
892 std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec> >& DeltaKappa) {
893 Triangle* Tp = fpvec[0]->TrianglePtr();
894 rvec rp[3];
895 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
896 rp[i] = Tp->Node(i);
897 }
898 double Ap = Tp->Area(), perimp = Tp->Perimeter();
899 rvec Tc(Tp->Center());
900 rvec junk(r - Tc);
901 rvec t(PrimitiveCell(junk));
902 double dist = sqrt(dot(r - t - Tc, r - t - Tc));
903 double kr = sqrt(norm(k_B)) * dist;
904 SingSub ss;
905
906 int Ndunavant;
907 double(*xdunavant)[3], *wdunavant;
908 if (NeedsAccurate) {
909 Ndunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N5;
910 xdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x5;
911 wdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::w17 : dunavant::w5;
912 } else {
913 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
914 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
915 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
916 }
917
918 bool NeedsSingSub = (dist < perimp) || (kr < 0.2 * PI);
919 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> (GreenFHom3DPer2D::*DKfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp,
920 rvec t) =
921 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateandGradientSmoothedTranslate
922 : &GreenFHom3DPer2D::EvaluateandGradientTranslate;
923
924 std::pair<dcmplx, cvec> DKtemp;
925 dcmplx Dtemp;
926 cvec Ktemp;
927 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
928 rvec sp = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
929 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
930 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[i];
931 DKtemp = (this->*DKfunction)(r, sp, t);
932 Dtemp = dAp * DKtemp.first;
933 Ktemp = dAp * DKtemp.second;
934 for (int j = 0; j < (int)fpvec.size(); ++j) {
935 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[j];
936 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(sp));
937 DeltaKappa[j].first +=
938 (fpsp * Dtemp - 1. / (k_B * k_B) * fp->RWGPreFactor() * Ktemp);
939 DeltaKappa[j].second += cross(Ktemp, (cvec)fpsp);
940 }
941 }
942
943 if (NeedsSingSub) {
944 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fpvec[0], r - t);
945 for (int j = 0; j < (int)fpvec.size(); ++j) {
946 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[j];
947 ss.ChangeTriangleRWG(fp);
948 DeltaKappa[j].first += exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) / (4. * PI) *
949 (-1. / (k_B * k_B) * fp->RWGPreFactor() *
950 (ss.K3(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K3(1)) +
951 (ss.K2(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K2(1)));
952 DeltaKappa[j].second += exp(I * dot(this->k, t)) / (4. * PI) *
953 (ss.K4(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K4(1));
954 }
955 }
956}
